metric_disclosed: 신계약 CSM 배수: NA (재보험사 — 코리안리는 신계약 CSM 배수를 공시하지 않음)
status: NOT DOWNLOADED — source site unreachable from this environment
block_diagnosis: koreanre.co.kr accepts TCP:443 + completes the TLS handshake but returns 0 bytes / ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE for every HTTP request, on every path and both www/non-www hosts. Reproduced via headless Chrome, headed Chrome (genuine fingerprint), raw socket+TLS, curl, urllib, and the WebFetch tool. This is a server-side IP/geo block against this network's egress, not a client fingerprint issue. No client-side workaround exists. IRGO (image-only) is explicitly disallowed, so no IR decks could be downloaded.

external_reference_not_from_file.note: Found via public web search only (edaily/marketin), NOT from a downloaded IR file. Korean Re discloses a 신계약 CSM AMOUNT (not a 배수).

2025.1Q.comment: 2025년 1분기 신계약 CSM 661억원 발생; CSM 잔액 전분기 대비 +8%, 1조원 상회. (원수사 공동개발 장기상품 수재 + 공동재보험 신규 인수)
